sections_implemented: Hero: Full-viewport Flower of Life canvas (19 circles + hexagonal lattice + enclosing circle + particle field + breathing glow)
The Pulse: Live system telemetry grid (health status, uptime, Ihsan score, SNR) with 30s auto-refresh
The Ascending Spiral: 4 narrative cards with scroll-triggered framer-motion animations (Seed, Architecture, Ethics, Proof)
The Ihsan Tensor: 8-dimension bar visualization with animated fills + composite score counter
The Sealed Proof: Cryptographic receipt mockup (block hash, BLAKE3 chain, Ed25519 + Dilithium signatures, FATE gate status)
CTA: Arabic calligraphy + lifecycle entry point
